summary.lv: Mikrotīkls SIA meklē C/C++ programmētāju Switching/Bridging komandai — izstrādāt protokolus, Linux kodola tīkla apakšsistēmas un draiverus. Nepieciešama pieredze ar OS kodola uzbūvi un Switching/Bridging protokoliem.
summary.en: Mikrotīkls SIA is looking for a C/C++ programmer for its Switching/Bridging team to develop protocols, Linux kernel network subsystems, and drivers. OS kernel knowledge and Switching/Bridging protocol experience required.
